remediation-plans.Description: Implement multi-factor authentication for all administrative access
Upgrade encryption to AES-256 for all PHI data stores
Deploy endpoint detection and response across vendor network
Establish formal incident response procedures and test annually
Implement data loss prevention controls for outbound communications
Conduct penetration testing and remediate critical findings
Update business continuity plan and validate DR procedures
Implement privileged access management solution
Deploy security information and event management system
Establish vendor security awareness training program
Implement network segmentation between production environments
Deploy automated vulnerability scanning on weekly schedule
Update and enforce password complexity requirements
Implement certificate-based authentication for API access
Establish formal change management process with security review
Deploy web application firewall for customer-facing applications
Implement database activity monitoring for PHI repositories
Update data retention and destruction procedures
Deploy cloud security posture management tooling
Establish security metrics and reporting dashboard
Implement zero-trust network architecture
Deploy container security scanning in CI/CD pipeline
Establish third-party code review for critical integrations
Implement API gateway with rate limiting and threat detection
Update backup procedures and test restoration quarterly
